name: Kamioun
description: Kamioun est une start-up qui propose aux magasins de quartier une plateforme mobile qui les aide à assurer la gestion de leurs stocks et à digitaliser leurs opérations.

# Reinventing the cornershop
The 1st B2B mobile platform reinventing the cornershop supply chain in Tunisia.
[ available on Apple Store ](https://apps.apple.com/fi/app/kamioun/id6446284732)[ available on Google Play ](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.kamioun.retailer)[ available on AppGallery ](https://appgallery.huawei.com/app/C103697517)
![Hero Banner](https://www.kamioun.com/_next/static/media/kamioun2.4f7db8e2.png)
![shape](https://www.kamioun.com/_next/static/media/banner-vector.902d0f71.png)
## Kamioun is a mobile first platform that is a one stop shop for small retailers, housing more than 1600 FMCG products on our app
### Efficient
You can order for your store inventory from any place at any time. Just remembered that your store needs more tuna at midnight while watching a game? Easily order from the app with minimal disruptions.
### Next day delivery
We deliver in less than 24 hours with orders getting to your shop from the time you place it. Delivery times are also convenient letting you pick what date is more suitable for you.
### Affordable
Unlike other distributors, prices on our app do not fluctuate every few days, helping you plan and manage your working capital better.
![About App](https://www.kamioun.com/_next/static/media/2-screens.fc89911f.png)
